description:
A HABROMANIA edit (my Alice in Wonderland Indie Game concept ) using some of the animations and concept art I've made over the past year! Really enjoy the dynamic between the whimsy, nostaglic, peaceful art I've made for this game mixed with the gritty, darker element of the plot. You can check out my page for more details about the story and the work we've done for it so far! @symphony_sonata
.
.
